tasks.title: Fix TypeScript Safety Violations in Core Package
tasks.description: DECOMPOSED: This large task has been broken down into 6 focused subtasks to address TypeScript safety violations systematically. Each subtask targets a specific type of violation: naming-convention (317), unbound-method (88), require-await (49), no-unsafe-member-access (35), no-unsafe-assignment (27), and no-unsafe-argument (26). Work should proceed with the individual subtasks rather than this parent task.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-* errors resolved in core package
All @typescript-eslint/naming-convention errors resolved
All @typescript-eslint/unbound-method errors resolved
Core package ESLint passes without safety warnings
No regressions in core functionality

tasks.title: Fix naming-convention violations in core package (317 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/naming-convention violations in packages/core. Update variable names, function names, class names, and property names to follow TypeScript naming conventions (camelCase, PascalCase, etc.).
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/naming-convention violations resolved in core package
Variable and function names follow camelCase convention
Class names follow PascalCase convention
No new naming convention violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix unbound-method violations in core package (88 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/unbound-method violations in packages/core. Add proper method binding and arrow function usage to prevent unbound method calls and this context issues.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/unbound-method violations resolved in core package
Proper method binding implemented where needed
Arrow functions used appropriately for method references
No new unbound method violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix require-await violations in core package (49 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/require-await violations in packages/core. Remove unnecessary async keywords from functions that do not await anything, or add proper await usage where needed.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/require-await violations resolved in core package
Unnecessary async keywords removed from non-awaiting functions
Proper await usage added where async operations are needed
No new require-await violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-member-access violations in core package (35 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-member-access violations in packages/core. Add proper type guards and type annotations to safely access properties on any/unknown types.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-member-access violations resolved in core package
Type guards added for unknown object property access
Proper type annotations for dynamic property access
No new unsafe member access violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-assignment violations in core package (27 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment violations in packages/core. Add proper type checking and type guards to prevent unsafe assignments from any/unknown types.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment violations resolved in core package
Type guards added before assignments from any/unknown types
Safe type conversion patterns implemented
No new unsafe assignment violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix no-argument-spread violations in core package (26 violations)
tasks.description: Resolve @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-argument violations in packages/core. Add proper type annotations for function parameters and return types to ensure type safety in function calls with spread syntax.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-argument violations resolved in core package
Proper type annotations for spread arguments
Safe function call patterns implemented
No new unsafe argument violations introduced

tasks.title: Ensure pnpm run start succeeds after build fixes
tasks.description: After fixing build issues, verify that pnpm run start command works correctly. Test the complete startup sequence including CLI initialization, server startup, and basic functionality. Address any runtime errors or startup failures that prevent n8n from running properly.
success_criteria: pnpm run start completes without errors
n8n CLI starts successfully
Server initializes properly
Basic n8n functionality works
No runtime startup errors

tasks.title: Implement custom node storage and validation service
tasks.description: Create backend service for custom node storage, validation, and metadata management. Implement secure file handling, MIME type validation, dependency checking, and node registry functionality. Include database schema for node metadata and version tracking.

tasks.title: Implement runtime node deployment and hot-reload system
tasks.description: Create system for safely deploying custom nodes to running n8n instances without requiring restarts. Implement hot-reload functionality, dependency injection, and rollback capabilities. Include proper isolation and error handling for runtime node integration.

tasks.title: Build frontend UI for custom node management
tasks.description: Create frontend interface for custom node management including upload forms, node gallery, deployment controls, and status monitoring. Implement drag-and-drop upload, progress indicators, and integration with existing n8n editor UI patterns.

tasks.title: Implement comprehensive testing for custom node management system
tasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite covering API endpoints, storage validation, deployment system, security measures, and frontend components. Include unit tests, integration tests, security tests, and end-to-end workflow testing. Test node upload, validation, deployment, and runtime integration scenarios.

tasks.title: Restore lost upstream features through git analysis
tasks.description: Analyze git history and upstream branch differences to identify any features or code that may have been lost during fork development. Use git analysis to compare this fork against the upstream branch and restore any missing functionality without removing the custom features added to this fork in previous commits. This includes conducting a comprehensive diff analysis and selective restoration of upstream changes.
success_criteria: Research report created: ./development/research-reports/research-report-task_1754668946023_rcvujtmyq.md

tasks.title: Create Quality Improvement Tasks
tasks.description: Analyze project quality issues and create specific tasks to reach 100% quality for all strikes
tasks.prompt:
Project quality assessment shows issues preventing 100% strike success:

Quality Status:
- Strike 1 (Build): 50%
- Strike 2 (Lint): 100%  
- Strike 3 (Tests): 30%

Issues Found:
- Build Verification: Build command fails
- Test Coverage and Success: Tests are failing
- Test Coverage and Success: Coverage check failed

TASK: Analyze these quality gaps and create specific improvement tasks to bring ALL strikes to 100% quality. Create tasks for:
1. Build issues (missing dependencies, build failures, configuration)
2. Code quality issues (lint errors, style violations, code standards)
3. Testing issues (failing tests, missing coverage, test setup)

Insert all improvement tasks BEFORE the strike review tasks. Strikes should always remain last in the task list.
success_criteria: All quality issues identified and analyzed
Specific improvement tasks created for each quality gap
Tasks properly prioritized and ordered before strikes
Clear path to 100% quality established

tasks.title: Enhance OAuth Setup for Cloud Providers
tasks.description: Simplify OAuth integration setup for services like Google, Microsoft, etc. The current manual setup process is cumbersome compared to SaaS alternatives. Create guided setup wizards and automated OAuth app configuration.

tasks.title: Add CRUD Operations to QuickBooks Node
tasks.description: Enhance QuickBooks node with missing basic CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete). Current implementation may be missing some standard operations available in competing platforms.

tasks.title: Restore Missing AI Features in Self-hosted Version
tasks.description: Investigate and restore any AI-powered parameters or tools that may have been removed or restricted in self-hosted versions after updates. Ensure feature parity with cloud versions where licensing permits.
success_criteria: Research report created: ./development/research-reports/research-report-task_1754681196945_y27bkf9kl.md

tasks.title: Create autosave configuration system with environment variables
tasks.description: Add autosave configuration to n8n config system with environment variables for enabling autosave, setting intervals (default 30 seconds), and configuring autosave behavior. Include validation and type safety.
success_criteria: AutosaveConfig class created in @n8n/config package
Environment variables defined for autosave settings
Configuration validation implemented
Default autosave interval set to 30 seconds

tasks.title: Implement autosave composable with interval management
tasks.description: Create Vue composable for managing autosave functionality including start/stop autosave, configurable intervals, dirty state monitoring, and preventing simultaneous saves. Handle edge cases like user navigation and manual saves.
success_criteria: useAutosave composable created with interval management
Automatic dirty state detection implemented
Prevent conflicts with manual saves
Handle navigation/page unload scenarios
Configurable autosave intervals

tasks.title: Add autosave visual indicators and user feedback
tasks.description: Implement visual indicators showing autosave status including saving indicator, last saved timestamp, and autosave enabled/disabled state. Add user controls to enable/disable autosave and configure intervals.
success_criteria: Autosave status indicator in workflow editor
Last saved timestamp display
User toggle to enable/disable autosave
Autosave interval configuration in settings
Visual feedback during autosave operations

tasks.title: Integrate autosave with NodeView workflow editor
tasks.description: Integrate autosave composable into the main NodeView component, setup automatic saving triggers on workflow changes, and ensure proper cleanup on component unmount.
success_criteria: Autosave integrated into NodeView.vue
Automatic saving on workflow state changes
Proper lifecycle management (start/stop on mount/unmount)
Integration with existing workflow saving logic
No conflicts with manual save operations

tasks.title: Add comprehensive testing for autosave functionality
tasks.description: Create unit tests for autosave composable, integration tests for NodeView autosave behavior, and E2E tests for complete autosave workflows including edge cases and error scenarios.
success_criteria: Unit tests for useAutosave composable (>90% coverage)
Integration tests for NodeView autosave integration
E2E tests for autosave workflows
Test edge cases (navigation, conflicts, errors)
Performance tests for autosave intervals

tasks.title: Fix n8n-local-rules ESLint rule definitions
tasks.description: Resolve missing n8n-local-rules definitions causing 35+ lint errors across CLI package. Rules like misplaced-n8n-typeorm-import and no-type-unsafe-event-emitter are undefined. Install, configure, or implement the missing custom ESLint rules.
success_criteria: All n8n-local-rules/* rule definitions found and working
ESLint can properly load and execute custom rules
All rule-not-found errors resolved
CLI package passes lint without rule definition errors

tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-member-access violations in workflow package
tasks.description: Resolve ~148 @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-member-access violations in packages/workflow. Add proper type annotations and safe property access patterns to avoid accessing properties on any/unknown types without proper type checking.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-member-access warnings resolved
Proper type guards added for unknown object property access
Type assertions replaced with safe type checking
No new unsafe member access violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-call violations in workflow package
tasks.description: Resolve ~132 @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-call violations in packages/workflow. Replace unsafe function calls with properly typed function signatures and add type guards for dynamic function calls.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-call warnings resolved
Function types properly defined instead of using Function type
Dynamic function calls protected with type guards
No new unsafe call violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-assignment violations in workflow package
tasks.description: Resolve ~30 @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment violations in packages/workflow. Add proper type checking and type guards to prevent unsafe assignments from any/unknown types.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment warnings resolved
Proper type checking added before assignments from any/unknown
Safe type conversion patterns implemented
No new unsafe assignment violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix miscellaneous TypeScript violations in workflow package
tasks.description: Resolve remaining TypeScript and ESLint violations in packages/workflow including prefer-nullish-coalescing, no-prototype-builtins, prefer-optional-chain, no-useless-escape, and no-unsafe-function-type violations. Clean up unused eslint-disable directives.
success_criteria: All prefer-nullish-coalescing warnings resolved
All no-prototype-builtins violations fixed with hasOwnProperty pattern
All prefer-optional-chain violations resolved
Unused eslint-disable directives removed
